description: Full senior-consultant CV extracted to structured profile.

source.raw_profile:
Alex Rivera — Senior Technology Consultant
9 years in cloud migration and microservices for financial services. Led a 14-month AWS migration of 60+ systems for a Tier-1 bank, cutting infrastructure cost 35%. Skills: AWS, microservices, Python, Kafka, Terraform. AWS Solutions Architect – Professional. B.Sc. Computer Science, Tel Aviv University, 2015.
